name: mintangle
description: Rectangle.app-style keyboard window management for the Cinnamon desktop.

scripts.install:local: npm run build && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/mintangle@cedrichan" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/mintangle@cedrichan" && cp -r build/. "$HOME/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/mintangle@cedrichan/"
